title: COLLATE in ORDER BY clause breaks name resolution
poc: SELECT 1 AS y FROM t1, t2 ORDER BY y;
SELECT 2 AS y FROM t1, t2 ORDER BY y COLLATE nocase;
key_bug_features: COLLATE clause in ORDER BY causes parsing error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER, y TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(y TEXT, z REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
SELECT 1 AS y FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.y = t2.y ORDER BY y COLLATE nocase;
